faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

placements.overview:
Government Medical College, Badaun is a public institute and is located in Uttar Pradesh. Government Medical College, Badaun courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by NMC and offers courses in Full Time mode. Government Medical College, Badaun offers a total of 2 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MD and MBBS and the total seat intake for the available courses is 100. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 1,62,000. Apart from this, the Government Medical College, Badaun campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Government Medical College, Badaun offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBBS. Whereas, at PG level, Government Medical College, Badaun offers courses such as MD. Government Medical College, Badaun fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,62,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This is very good college for medical students.

review_content.Placements: Good doctors are coming from my college. 70,000 per month is average package of GMC, Badaun. All pass out student get placed. Government provides job for pass out students. There is mandatory internship. The students may get PG Doctor seat and become specilist doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is quite good infrastructure. Hostel provided by government. There is separate library and reading room. Good hostel for both girls and boys. Sports and game organised annually by college students. Mess is within the hostel and mess food is clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement and a bright future.

review_content.Placements: 100 seats are there in college, all are placed in government hospitals as medical officer there is handsome salary of about 85000 there is no problem in finding job, All private sector hospital are ready to hire a MBBS graduate 50 thousands to 150000 are offered to each candidate .
review_content.Infrastructure: Academic block hospital area all labs are well prepared library is present all lt are well maintained, well ventilated rooms are there, lt are fully air conditioning, Wi-Fi is not available Mess is there, but it is so, not very good food is present .

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the fee structure and placements after completion of our course.

review_content.Placements: Around 5-6% of students are placed. The average salary pacakge is Rs 80,000, and the lowest salary pacakge offered is 16 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered is 8 LPA, and the highest is up to 1 crore because after becoming a doctor it depends on students' passion and hard work. Apollo, Fortis, Majenta, and many others may start their hospital all admitted students, all from the government of India. The top roles offered are junior resident, chief medical officer, and senior resident.
review_content.Infrastructure: Academic block for classes and well-maintained lecture theater for lectures, well-equipped hospital with many JR, SR, professor, and chief medical officer, with surgery and gynecology department. The mess food is good in taste and made with hygiene. The playground and all games equipment are provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average medical College in UP and is developing slowly. But the infrastructure is not good.

review_content.Placements: About 5-6% of the students got placed in the MBBS course. The lowest salary offered after this course is approximately Rs.50,000- Rs. 90,000 per month, but after doing PG Super specialty than average package is 2.5 lacs to 4 lacs per month. All the students are doing internships after they clear the semesters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this is not well developed. Wi-Fi is not provided. Labs are completed for the first year but labs for other years are not completed. Classrooms are well prepared. Sitting capacity is good and comfortable. Mess food is not good, and sports are not available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the infrastructure, well-educated faculty members, and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: We are 100 students in a batch of the first year as a first batch of the college. MBBS college doesn't have such kind of placements as engineering colleges, but doctors have opportunities to do their JR ship from the college OPD.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is currently under construction. Labs are not much maintained, but things are enough to get your MBBS done. Classrooms are well maintained and fully air-conditioned. Library is good but missing some books. There is no Wi-Fi given to the students. Hotels are well maintained. A good electricity supply is provided. Mess quality is not that much good. Even there is no canteen at present. The sports ground is also under construction.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I am studying at MBBS college, and my batch is the founder batch of this college. So, for now, there is no possibility of placement. There is an exam named NEXT exam for the PG seat and for an internship. It is divided into 2 parts NEXT-1 and NEXT-2. Internship and PG seat is based on the rank scored by the students in NEXT-1.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has been under construction till now. Classrooms and the library are fully functional. The academic block is functional. The hostel facility is good, but mess food is not good enough. There is no proper college canteen. The sports and games facility is good.

description: Government Medical College, Badaun cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Badaun NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 24035 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Badaun MBBS cutoff 2025 was 24035 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16929 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Badaun accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

The NEET PG cutoff 2024 was released for admission to the MD, MS, and PG Diploma courses across categories. During the last round of Government Medical College, Badaun MD cutoff 2024, the closing rank was 51196 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Of all the MD specialisations, the top most competitive specialisation for admission was MD in Preventive and Social Medicine/ Community Medicine for the general category.

Government Medical College, Badaun NEET PG cutoff 2024 was announced for MD courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks. As per the last round cutoff, MD in Preventive and Social Medicine/ Community Medicine had the most stringent cutoff rank of 51196 for admission among the students belonging to the General AI category.

NEET PG Counselling 2024 has been released for different categories of students. The special stray vacancy round result was the last round for NEET PG counselling. Candidates, who appeared in the counselling process can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NEET PG cutoff lists.

Government Medical College, Badaun cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1, wherein the closing rank for MBBS admission is 17356 among the General HS category students. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the HS quota.

Among the OBC category candidates, the UP NEET UG Round 1 cutoff stood at 18939 for MBBS under the HS quota. To view the cutoff ranks for different categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filtres.

review_content.Placements: The college is in a rural area of Akola. About 10 km from the city. But patient flow is good, with a minimum of 100 patients visiting and a maximum of 150–160. Medical facilities are available in college.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the faculty members of our college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college were average. Approximately 40% of the students got placed at that time, and rest of the batch got placed on their own references. The biggest recruiter of our college was Sunfarm. The average salary package offered was about 3.5 LPA. The college also provides internship opportunities for the practical exposure of the student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was vast and huge. There were four towers on the campus. The campus was fully air-conditioned along with all-time Wi-Fi facility. The campus had a big food court along with a huge library where studies were provided to students. There were two huge grounds in which one was for events, annual function and so on. The second one was for gaming purpose. There was only one hostel which was only for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This campus is completely ragging free.

review_content.Placements: In the D. pharma course, many students were placed in many companies. D. pharma has given good opportunities for every student. 60% of students in our class were placed in companies. When D. pharma is completed many companies visited our college for placements and take interviews with students to see their performance. Many brilliant students take packages from companies with the highest package ever recorded to be 1.5 Lac per annum and many students were hired with a salary of Rs 80,000. The package offer is based on the student's performance.

review_content.Placements: In our college, 150 students are placed every year per course. After completing MBBS internships are conducted in the respective college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for M.Com. Course.

content.Placements: College placement rates typically fall between 86 and 92%. A maximum salary of 25 to 30 LPA is offered. The minimum wage that is offered is between 5 and 10 LPA. The typical pay scale is between 13 and 20 LPA. Well-known businesses like Bosch, Qualcomm, and Infosys visit the campus to recruit students from our programme. Seventy to eighty percent of the students received internships at various companies. Top candidates for tax advisers, chartered accountants, and other positions.
content.Infrastructure: This college boasts the best hotels and facilities in all of India, as you can clearly observe. You may also look it up on Google, and you will undoubtedly be shocked. About 200 acres make up this college's vast land area, which is home to numerous laboratories and sizable lots. Additionally, this college has separate residence halls for males and females as well as a gymnasium for students.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a better college in Ernakulam for the M.Sc. in Botany course.

content.Placements: 85 percent of M.Sc. in Botany students got well-placed in college. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the average package ranges from 25 -18 LPA. The lowest package is 16 LPA. 61 percent of students got placed in their hometown. Some research institutes visit our college, like Biocon, Syngene International, etc., and offer jobs for many students.
content.Infrastructure: There is a big library where we can get all books and study material. The college campus offers 24x7 Wi-Fi access. The campus has a mess. The mess food quality is good and at reasonable prices. There is a clinic to get fast medical treatment for free.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has a decent infrastructure, but good faculty members.

content.Placements: This college has a strong placement record, with almost 90% of students hired by Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan Chase, Moody's Analytics, and many others. Internship opportunities are also quite available. Regarding the package, the median salary is 16 LPA, while the highest is 26 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The College offers us a decent infrastructure. The college has a well-established library, which is a valuable resource for students. Classrooms are generally good, equipped with some smart technology. There is a canteen in the old building and a newer, well-maintained one in the new building. The college also provides us with medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college is one of the better options for M.Sc. Botany.

content.Placements: About 88% of students received placements in various companies. The highest package was 25 LPA, the average package ranged from 18 to 22 LPA, and the lowest package was 15 LPA. Oxfam India, Bayer CropScience, and Environment Conservation were some of the companies that recruited students. Internships were difficult to obtain in my field of study, but around 76% of students secured internships every year.
content.Infrastructure: My college had good infrastructure in my department. Internet access was always available. All classrooms were digital classrooms. The college labs were well-equipped. individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for M.Com.

content.Placements: Overall, jobs are good, with several students having options at the start of hiring. Many are selected for roles in finance, accounting, consulting, data interpretation, and taxation, and many also earn internships during their studies. These awards typically fall into the middle and upper echelons, and many well-established organizations attend the academy each year, providing sustainable opportunities for all departments and industries.
content.Faculty: Our college teachers are very helpful and experienced, and most of them cover the subjects thoroughly. Semester tests are more rigorous, and evaluation criteria are more stringent than those of many other colleges, which also affects pass rates. While the curriculum is comprehensive and helps with placement, students must work hard to earn an internship. Most of the teachers are excellent, and although academic excellence is maintained, the exams are always difficult.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is St Teresa's College. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #60 under Colleges category. St Teresa's College excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around St Teresa's College rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Kerala In 2024
6th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Kerala In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, St Teresa's College outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. St Teresa's College's rankings in 'Colleges' category have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, St Teresa's College fell 14 ranks to #60 rank in the 'Colleges' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: St Teresa's College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for M.Com. Course.
reviews.review_text: This college boasts the best hotels and facilities in all of India, as you can clearly observe. You may also look it up on Google, and you will undoubtedly be shocked. About 200 acres make up this college's vast land area, which is home to numerous laboratories and sizable lots. Additionally, this college has separate residence halls for males and females as well as a gymnasium for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college in Ernakulam for the M.Sc. in Botany course.
reviews.review_text: There is a big library where we can get all books and study material. The college campus offers 24x7 Wi-Fi access. The campus has a mess. The mess food quality is good and at reasonable prices. There is a clinic to get fast medical treatment for free.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a decent infrastructure, but good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The College offers us a decent infrastructure. The college has a well-established library, which is a valuable resource for students. Classrooms are generally good, equipped with some smart technology. There is a canteen in the old building and a newer, well-maintained one in the new building. The college also provides us with medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This college is one of the better options for M.Sc. Botany.
reviews.review_text: My college had good infrastructure in my department. Internet access was always available. All classrooms were digital classrooms. The college labs were well-equipped. All instruments were in good condition and fully functional. The campus had a canteen. The food was really good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for M.Com.
reviews.review_text: Overall, jobs are good, with several students having options at the start of hiring. Many are selected for roles in finance, accounting, consulting, data interpretation, and taxation, and many also earn internships during their studies. These awards typically fall into the middle and upper echelons, and many well-established organizations attend the academy each year, providing sustainable opportunities for all departments and industries.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a positive and supportive environment.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-equipped infrastructure to support its academic and extracurricular activities. The college, spread over a limited area, has expanded vertically with multiple blocks housing classrooms and other facilities. Key infrastructure includes a library, hostel, auditorium, chapel, e-learning center, council room, gym, seminar hall, and an open-air auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: The best college and well-qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: On the campus, Wi-Fi was available almost everywhere. I had well-equipped and well-ventilated laboratories. Classrooms had comfortable chairs, air conditioning, projectors, and switchboards. The library had comfortable seating, air conditioning, and a large selection of books that were pertinent to my study. Any book could be checked out for a few days as well. The mess's food was good, and the canteen was a little better. The health facility provided a variety of drugs and was open 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: There are many opportunities waiting for all. Really gonna enjoy you're college life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is so good. Nice facilities are been provided. Good Wi-Fi connection, classrooms, canteen and the library is so great. The college is having many sports and games. And also each every student csn be a part of any clubs in the college according to your will.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Com. course.
reviews.review_text: The amenities at our college are awesome. Everything we need is provided by our college. The classrooms are excellent. Our college has engineering labs. They have all the necessary equipment. At our college, Wi-Fi is available. The classroom is smart. You will be recommended to a hospital for a positive clinical experience. You'll be asked to pick up neighborhood deliveries. Student talks are offered.

reviews.review_heading: A ten-minute review about my college.
reviews.review_text: I loved the college because the rules and regulations are more liberal and okay than other colleges. Such liberal activities help the students promote their own skills in their passionate careers. The libraries are common for students from all disciplines and include 10,000+ books and other online resources.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best for pursuing an M.A. in Economics.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was great. Classrooms were good, and the entire campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The library was well equipped with many different books for students. Hostel facilities were appreciable. The college provides students with Wi-Fi access. Quality food was provided by the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college gives the best placement offers to students.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are properly decorated with air conditioning and projectors. A well-stocked library is available with various books. Labs are equipped with many instruments. The mess food is delicious and hygienic, and the college canteen is also good. The college provides health facilities 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for the M.Com. Course.
reviews.review_text: Each department also has a common faculty room and a lecture hall with full air conditioning and standard Wi-Fi. The library is also a great place to study. Our hostels have average infrastructure, as it is old, but the food in the mess and canteens is very good. Also, hotels have sports stadiums.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for the M.Sc. in Physics course.
reviews.review_text: The library is clearly the finest in the nation! The classrooms are excellent, and there is a wide range of sports and extracurricular options available. The festival committees are entirely managed by students. The space is rather simple but certainly not pleasant. The food's quality is outstanding and meticulously attended to. Hostels are quite expensive, and the enrollment procedure is rather straightforward.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for PGDM in Business Analytics Course.
reviews.review_text: Campus has world-class classrooms and a library. Unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi throughout campus. There is a separate mess and canteen for each hostel. Even though there are many restaurants, such as Domino's, Cafe Coffee Day, etc. There is a nice hospital, which is open 24/7. Our college has lots of land,  2 gymnasiums,  11 basketball courts, and more.

placements.overview: The Department of Training and Placement (DTP) of PRIST University Thanjavur is known for its knowledge and tested practices that transform students by harnessing their knowledge and experiences; allowing them to become industry-ready professionals. The main objectives of the deemed-to-be University are to embed the below-listed seven elements of soft skills into their students:

faqs.answer: A:    Both PRIST (deemed-to-be) University and MSU offer full-time MBA programmes. Talking about the placements, the median pacakge offered during MBA placements at PRIST University was INR 4 LPA in 2023. The median salary package offered to MBA students at MSU ranged from INR 1.3 LPA to INR 1.5 LPA. It can be clearly seen that PRIST University has better placements for MBA students.
faqs.question: Which university offer better MBA placements among PRIST and MSU?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University graduates can pursue various career prospects after completing an MBA. Based on their specialisation and areas on interest, they can build a career in various industries in the private as well as the government sector. The following table contains some of the most in-demand jobs for MBA graduates of PRIST University:Job ProfilesAverage Salary (in INR)Product Manager24.7 LPAManagement Consulting7 LPAMarketing Manager12 LPAProject Manager19.1 LPASales Manager6.7 LPAMarketing
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing MBA at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University has not released the placement data specifically applying to its MBA placements. However, the university's NIRF Report 2024 is available. Based on the report, the median package offered during UG (2-year) placements at PRIST University was INR 4 LPA in 2023. Hence, MBA students at the university can expect to grab a salary package of around INR 4 LPA during MBA placements at PRIST University.
faqs.question: What is the average salary that I can expect after completing an MBA at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    Pursuing a BCom at PRIST opens career paths leading to private/government jobs in various industries, entrepreneurial ventures, etc. Graduates can also pursue further education with courses like MCom, MBA, etc. Some job positions that BCom graduates of PRIST University can take up are listed below:AccountantBusiness ExecutiveAccounts ManagerTax ConsultantFinancial ConsultantAccount ExecutiveBusiness Consultant
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing BCom at PRIST?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PRIST University offers full-time BTech, BArch, BA, BCom, BSc, BCA, BBA and BPharm at undergraduate level. Other than regular BTech, the deemed-to-be University offers part-time BTech programme in a number of specialisations. At postgraduate level, it offers MTech, MCA, B.Ed, MA, MBA, MCom, MSc, MOpt and M.Ed as part of academic curriculum. Other than regular UG and PG programmes, PRIST University also offers integrated programmes such as BSc B.Ed and BA B.Ed in the stream of Education, whereas BSc LLB, BBA LLB and BCom LLB programmes.

faqs.answer: A:    Fees for BSc at PRIST university is 24 K - 8.1 L. It's based on how you are joining in this college. If you join through eligibility of 10th and 12th with a minimum aggregate of 50%. So those kind of persons will have a less fees. Otherwise if you join through management quota then that students will have a high amount of fees. So its better to join through some eligibility.
faqs.question: What is the fee for B Sc. at PRIST University - Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    At PRIST University, the fees for various courses are as follows :B.Tech- 1.5 L - 8.1 L with 45 percent in graduationMBA- 1.1 L - 2 L along with 50 percent in graduationMsc- 14 K - 48 K with 50 percent in graduationMCA- 65 K and graduation 50 percentB.Ed- 50 K
faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology course admission are based on entrance or merit-based. The university offers courses, such as BTech, BSc, BBA, MBA, M.Tech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. The university offers more than 20 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The application process at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology is conducted online or offline.
faqs.question: Can I get into Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University offers a full-time BCom programme at the UG-level. The university has specified an eligibility requirement for candidates seeking admission to the programme. To be eligible to pursue BCom at the university, a candidate must have passed Class 12 from a recognised board,   preferably with Accountancy, Commerce/Business Studies, Economics/Computer Science, Statistics/Business Mathematics. They must present the documents required to prove their eligibility for admission.

Third week result will fall in 50% refund,During the fourth week, a 25% refund is given.After the fourth week, no refund is provided.

fees_overview.description: Candidates can enroll for any of the Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology courses by paying the course fee. The fee for the available courses ranges from INR 25,000 - 8,07,000. The Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology fee is made up of a number of different elements, including the tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. There are two types of Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology fee components: refundable and non-refundable. overview_faqs.question: Does PRIST University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: PRIST University has a fees refund policy that allows students to cancel their enrollment before the start of university classes and receive a full refund of tuition and fees.If a student withdraws during the first week of classes, they will receive a 90% refundif they withdraw during the second week, they will receive a 75% refund. Third week result will fall in 50% refund,During the fourth week, a 25% refund is given.After the fourth week, no refund is provided.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth joining Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: As per Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.34 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. Further, a total of 48 students were placed and 4 students opted for higher studies out of total 59 students during MBA placements 2023. Other than this, 159 students were placed and 21 students opted for higher studies out of total 198 students during BTech placements 2023. Students can check the detailed PRIST University placement stats here.

overview_faqs.answer: Fees for BSc at PRIST university is 24 K - 8.1 L. It's based on how you are joining in this college. If you join through eligibility of 10th and 12th with a minimum aggregate of 50%. So those kind of persons will have a less fees. Otherwise if you join through management quota then that students will have a high amount of fees. So its better to join through some eligibility.

review_summary.college_name: Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of PRIST University - Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: The college provides good placements in CSE. A good number of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The roles offered are associate software engineer, associate system engineer etc. Very few students got internships, but many students got placed in MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs and a library with plenty of books for all branches. Hostel facilities are good for Chennai people. The quality of food is good in the mess. Canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It has good faculty members and facilities, and I am satisfied with the teaching quality and events.

content.Placements: This is the best place to learn something new and get easily placed after graduation. Some of the top recruiting companies visit the campus, and students get placed easily. The college is very good and organises industrial visits for the students of all years.
content.Infrastructure: There are lots of facilities available in the college, like free Wi-Fi, gym, sports, library, classrooms and labs. The canteen provides some modern food and also fast food. The food is very tasty and good. Hostels are available for girls and boys.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: There is a good infrastructure for education.

content.Placements: Roles like application development associate, technical trainee and support engineer are offered in our college. Many companies visit here and recruit students as per their requirement. Students are trained well for placements so that they can easily qualify in interviews.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides the best quality education, along with proper classrooms, practical labs and library. Hostel facilities are good to stay, and there is every facility in the hostel. The hostel is nearer to the transportation location for hostellers to travel.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Nov 2022)- B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Not much satisfied. But satisfied with that college.

content.Placements: College is very good college. One of the best college in thanjavur. Placements is very good. Communication skills is very good. There will be placement training is available in prist college. Among 80 students 50 percent students will be placed every year.
content.Infrastructure: While coming to infrastructure topic. The college is having a very good building named according to engineering departments the strength in the college is also very good having Wi-Fi facilities both in the classrooms and in the hostels. The college is well-equipped with full lab infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Worth the money. If you want to study at medium fee structure in good premises, join this college.

content.Placements: 75% of our seniors got placed in reputed companies, especially from CSE department because IT companies recruited many students. All bio departments like biotech and biomedical students also get placed in India and abroad too.
content.Infrastructure: It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are non-A/C, but large and environment-friendly. The library has all books related to departments and competitive exams like GATE, etc. Medical facilities are available on campus because there is a medical college on the campus only. Canteen food is good and healthy. The hostel rooms are very good, and it is like an independent home.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to B.Tech at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: To get into PRIST University for a BTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology offers full-time BTech courses of four years' duration. Students can get into this course based on merit + TNEA counselling. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: Is B.Tech available at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, the BTech course is available at PRIST University. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate.  Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology admission process is merit + TNEA counselling.

faqs.question: Does PRIST have an entrance exam for BA admission?
faqs.answer: No, there is no entrance exam required for BA admission at PRIST University. The university admits students to its BA programme based on their merit in Class 12 and availability of seats. Interested candidates are required to fill out an application form in online/offline mode. Before applying, candidates must ensure that they fulfil thePRIST University BA eligibility criteria.

courses_data.name: PRIST University MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the PG level,PRIST Universityprovides a two-year MTech course to the students. Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology offered at the institution is spread over 4 semesters. Students seeking admission must have passing scores in their past qualifying degree or Intermediate exams.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for M.Tech at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for the M.Tech programme at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology is 48. The programme is offered at the PG level and has a duration of two years. Candidates must have a graduation degree with 50% aggregate and must appear and qualify for admission. The university also considers scores of other national-level entrance exams for the final seat allotment.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in 12th boards. Can I get admission in M.Tech at PRIST University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who score 60% aggregate in Class 12 boards are eligible for the M.Tech course at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology. The eligibility criteria for the course is a Bachelor's degree or equivalent in the relevant field obtained at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category).

faqs.question: What is the eligibility requirement for BCom admission at PRIST University?

placement_report.college_name: Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: PRIST University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2025, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2024 stood at I NR 4.87 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 391 students were placed out of 435 students . Of these 55 belonged to MBA , 92 were from MTech and 244 were part of BTech program. The median salary recorded for MBA during PRIST placements was INR 4.80 LPA.

tables.context: Are there any government jobs that I can seek afte
What are the career opportunities available for BA

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom at PRIST University?
faqs.answer: BCom graduates can take up various job roles in the Finance sector of government organisations, such as government bank and regulatory bodies. They are also eligible for competitve exams, such as UPSC, SSC, etc., that lead to various jobs in the government sector. Tabulated below are some of the prospective government jobs for BCom graduates of PRIST University, along with their average salaries: Job Profile Average Salary Bank Probationary Officer (PO) INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may differ from student to student based on their skills and competency.

faqs.question: Does PRIST University have good placements?
faqs.answer: PRIST University has a good placement record. According to reports more than 80% of students get placed every year. Wipro, Capgemini, Mahindra, TCS, and Sunpharma were the top recruiters who participated in the placement drives. The university has a separate Training Placement cell which provides students help to secure job opportunities. The highest package offered was INR 6.5 LPA, and the minimum package was around INR 1.2 LPA.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at PRIST University for MBA?
faqs.answer: Placements for the highest package in PRIST University continuously see its highest offering set at around INR 6.5 LPA (LPA meaning Lakhs Per Annum) which is also stated by several sources. Nevertheless, it should be emphasized that this data is the result of the past year's placement drive and may not even be the highest package-offer for the year 2024. The latest updates about the highest salary package for MBA students going through the process of placement for the 2024 batch can be found at the college site or in the college admission office when the placements for the 2024 batch closes.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities available for BA graduates of PRIST Chennai?
faqs.answer: PRIST Chennai BA programme is offered in one speicalisation, i.e. BA in English. BA in English is a 3-year undergraduate degree programme focusing on English Literature as a core subject. The following table highlights some of the jobs best suited for BA English graduates: BA English Top Job Profiles Average Salary (in INR) Academic Writers 4.1 lakh Event Managers 4.8 lakh Librarians 3.4 lakh Administrative Officers 5.4 lakh Copy Editors 3.2 lakh

reviews.review_heading: There is a good infrastructure for education.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the best quality education, along with proper classrooms, practical labs and library. Hostel facilities are good to stay, and there is every facility in the hostel. The hostel is nearer to the transportation location for hostellers to travel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Centre for Distance Education, Prist UniversityReviewed on 26 Aug 2018)
reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied. But satisfied with that college.
reviews.review_text: While coming to infrastructure topic. The college is having a very good building named according to engineering departments the strength in the college is also very good having Wi-Fi facilities both in the classrooms and in the hostels. The college is well-equipped with full lab infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money. If you want to study at medium fee structure in good premises, join this college.
reviews.review_text: It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are non-A/C, but large and environment-friendly. The library has all books related to departments and competitive exams like GATE, etc. Medical facilities are available on campus because there is a medical college on the campus only. Canteen food is good and healthy. The hostel rooms are very good, and it is like an independent home.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for entertainment.
reviews.review_text: Our University was wide enough and had a large warandha. Good environment and nice location to reach. Classroom are neat and clean. We had played a lot. Food quality is not good. Canteen is available. Labs facility available. Wi-Fi connection available. Hostellers are Requested to be safe as snakes and monkeys around you.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly faculty members for Students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is Average, Since it is located in the Highways between Trichy and Thanjavur we can't expect the high-speed internet connection even in our Mobile ! And there is no free Wi-Fi connection, But the computer lab is very good more than 200 computers are available for students in the Computer Lab.

reviews.review_heading: There are poor placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good in the semi-urban area. The classrooms are quite good. They can improve their canteens, and they can introduce new mini canteens, there is only the limited amount of food available, we can't expect good and tasty food here.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of normal teachers and some faculty.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, normal labs, classrooms. The library facility is no more in the east campus, and there are no medical facilities, sports and cultural programmes. There is no infrastructure. No good quality food is available in the canteen, and there are two or three items in the canteen. I don't know about the hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Wasted 4 years of my life in PRIST.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is a big question mark for all the students who studied in this university. To be frank, when I entered the college, the building size was so big, but after entering into it, I was shocked that we don't have current facility and lab facility. Sometimes we do not have even drinking water facility. A road size food shop is better than the canteen inside the college. There are no special events in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Fact about my college review by a last bench student.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility for the students. In my college, we have proper labs and technician, sufficient classrooms, attractive and well-equipped library. We don't have proper medical facilities. The sports performances were quite well. Allowing and conducting zonal Anna university matches. The hostel and canteen food facilities are poor.

reviews.review_heading: Worst college of my life and my career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very huge. There are two to three buildings with four floors. There are 55 classrooms with two fans in each. There is no Wi-Fi facility. There is a huge library. No medical facilities are provided. Sports and games are not encouraged. There is a huge computer lab in the college. The labs and classrooms are of good quality. The canteen food is available, but the quality of food is very bad which spoils students health. The hostel facility is provided for boys ...

reviews.review_heading: Wastage of money, time, and talent.
reviews.review_text: The library of PRIST university is quite big and well-established. The entire campus is covered by high-speed Wi-Fi. There are no medical facilities available in the college. Only very basic first aid box is there. The classrooms are below average. On the wall of classrooms, you can easily find cracks. The college has well-established labs. The computer science lab has 1000 computers and they are fully functional. Other department labs are good enough.T he college has a canteen and it is just av...

reviews.review_heading: Complete dissatisfied due to placement. They teach from the exam's prospective, not for knowledge.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good.
High-speed Wi-Fi, air-conditioned lab, huge collections of book in the library, first aid facility in MBA block, etc. are available.
2 grounds are there- one for basketball (court) and one common for all activities.

The food quality is best for south Indian people.
Others can't tolerate that food every day.
Hostel facility is good but you have to walk 2 km every day to attend the classes because there is no transport facility inside the campus.
After 8 pm, you can't buy ...

Good academic and good scope for practical. But the placement activities is not much better although some of students was selected in campus placement with minimum salary package. One more concern about this institution is it is very far from rest of North India. You will need 12 hrs traveling from Chennai. Good academic and good scope for practical. paragraphs: Fees for BSc at PRIST university is 24 K - 8.1 L. It's based on how you are joining in this college. If you join through eligibility of 10th and 12th with a minimum aggregate of 50%. So those kind of persons will have a less fees. Otherwise if you join through management quota then that students will have a high amount of fees. So its better to join through some eligibility.
At PRIST University, the fees for various courses are as follows :
B.Tech- 1.5 L - 8.1 L with 45 percent in graduation
MBA- 1.1 L - 2 L along with 50 percent in graduation
Msc- 14 K - 48 K with 50 percent in graduation
MCA- 65 K and graduation 50 percent
B.Ed- 50 K

PRIST University MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 2 lakh for the entire course duration. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. Other components included in the PRIST MBA fee structure are hostel fees, medical insurance, mess and other security deposits, etc.

At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research (ABIPER) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges for pharmacy students.

content.Placements: Minimum 90% of students will get placements from our college. The average package is 12 LPA. The lowest average package is 6 LPA. The college is very good at placements. It has a connection with good and big top companies. One of the best colleges for placements.
content.Infrastructure: This college has one of the best infrastructure. I am a Pharma.D student. Classrooms are good and labs are too clean. Library is also good, we will get required books from library. The hostel is also good. The canteen food is also good.

content.Placements: 49% on average, it would be around 40-49%, which is average and should be more. 4 lacs, 2.4 lacs, and 3 lacs are the most appropriate. Zuventus is the leading company that was hiring students only for MR jobs, nothing else. No research.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, simple labs, simple classrooms, average library where there are more restrictions than the books that are actually needed. The worst hostel with double-decker Bed (6 pax in a single room), average canteen, no medical facilities, decent auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research.

content.Placements: Over 80% of students in my course were placed. The total cost of studying, including hostel fees, is over 2 lakhs. There are no packages for my course, but the majority of students from our college got internships in various companies.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is available in our course. The department of commerce is very good. Wi-Fi is available in our college. We have multiple labs for every sense. Classrooms are very hygienic. The quantity of the food in the hostel is very good in Muscat. We have medical faculty members to see students. We have multiple sports in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Seniors told us that this college was in the top 5 best colleges in 2020. It's a great thing.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are what we like. The college structure, and canteen food, are really good. The classroom protection facilities, AC, and also 24*7 electricity. The chemistry lab arrangement is also really nice. Sports are rare during the period when we are completing our exams.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: For my course, they provided 24-hour Wi-Fi for college purposes. There were different labs for different subjects where we could conduct our experiments. The classrooms were technologically advanced, equipped with TVs and projectors, and were like smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is average but hostel facilities are not good. For studying it's a good college .
reviews.review_text: There are around 1000 students in hostels which are available for 90,000 per annum. I stay in a hostel so I don't know much about the PG. Food is a bit disturbing and not good but that's okay. And the quality of living in the hostel is good. College infrastructure is not up to the mark .

college_info.college_name: Compare Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ramchandra Chandravansi University offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Com. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.Ed. Ramchandra Chandravansi University fee structure ranges between INR 60,000 to 4,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Let's have a glimpse of my collage (student addition).

review_content.Placements: In computer science engineering, until now there's has been no placement. Apart from that for Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics there has been placement. Around 3-4 companies do come to our college and they hire students in bulk.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has amazing infrastructure, it has huge classrooms, libraries, auditorium, playground and department wise building. Within the college campus there is college hostel where there's availability of food( mess or canteen). Ramchandra Chandravansi University has it's own medical college and hospital named as Laxmi Chandravansi medical college and hospital, so there is availability of medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College life unfiltered: My honest review.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is 56%. The highest package is 240,000 p/a and the lowest package is 144,000 p/a. Larsen and Toubro (L&T), Hindustan Construction Company (HCC), Afcon Infrastructure. The percentage of students who got internships from my course is 27%, and companies are just like NCC, and Adani Realty. The top roles offered in my course are supervisor, site in-charge, assistant engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, parking, bank, ATM, hospital, etc. The quality of facilities in my hostel, such as food quality, rooms, canteen, playground, etc., is awesome because of my college faculty members and guards.

paragraphs:
Ramchandra Chandravansi University course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theRamchandra Chandravansi Universityapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of Ramchandra Chandravansi University courses, students can visit the website.

Ramchandra Chandravansi University fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Ramchandra Chandravansi University fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Ramchandra Chandravansi University admission:

review_summary.college_name: Sahayog Educational Campus Indira College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Marathwada region.

content.Placements: Almost 30-40% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered ranges between 8 LPA - 9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 3 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiting company is Flamingo Pharmaceutical.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are well-maintained. It also has digital teaching boards. There is a decent library and several books are available. The food served in the canteen is good. Sports are conducted in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has excellent infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The average salary package offered is 5 LPA to 6 LPA by Flamingo Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Almost 30-40% of students are placed. The top role offered is drug inspector.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. Labs are well-equipped. The library environment is peaceful. All equipment and chemicals are available in labs. Outdoor sports like cricket, volleyball, and badminton are available. The quality of food in the canteen is excellent.
content.Faculty: Curriculum activities are excellent. Our teachers are helpful. They are well-qualified, knowledgeable, and experienced. Exams are conducted with proper management. Exams are difficult.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of faculty members, but provide good placements for 2015.

content.Placements: For eligible students, pharmacy jobs include pharma vigilance, clinical data management, medical underwriting, medication inspection, and more. Pharma.D graduates can work in government hospitals, CRPF, pharmacovigilance, staff selection commission, government colleges and universities, sports authority of India.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food offered in the mess and canteens are also good. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the laboratories are also good. In the classrooms, a Wi-Fi facility is not available, but outside the blocks, in the college parks, canteen, and some zones Wi-Fi facility works well. Hostels are properly maintained with proper hygiene, good quality food, separate canteens, medical facilities in and outside hostels, sports and program committees in and outside the hostel are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and one of the best facilities

content.Placements: 60% of students were placed and the average package is 5 to 6 LPA companies like flemingo pharmaceutucal ltd.will placed in our college top roles offered in our college is M.pharm B.pharm etc . All how student chose the which role to course very well
content.Infrastructure: Free wifi in our college labs are very clean and hygienic classrooms are big and above 10benches in each row that is total 40 benches medical facilites nice sports like volleyball and cricket are organise in this college canteen has well hygienic and many more foods available

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college provides medium level of education.

content.Placements: The top recruiting companies were Wipro, Airtel, etc. Placements were good in our course. There were good opportunities for placements. I would rate 3 stars out of 5 for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided an excellent educational environment. There were different types of laboratories for all branches. You will notice various laboratory classes for every faculty member. We had to study ourselves for a better future.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were average. I would rate 4 stars out of 5 for semester exams and faculty members. Semester exams were conducted very strictly. If you cheat during exams then you will be restricted from writing other exams. The course curriculum was medium.

college_info.intro:
Noorul Islam University offers three-year BA, BCA, BCom, BE, BSc, BASLP, BBA, and other courses to students at the undergraduate level. Moreover, at the postgraduate level, Noorul Islam University offers one to two-year MCA, MSc, MBA, ME, and MA courses to students. The university also offers PG diploma and PhD courses to the students.
The flagship programme offered at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education is the BE in various specialisations, including Software Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Biomedical Science & Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The university provides this programme to students at the UG level. The university offers the BE programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education courses strive to enhance students' learning experience to prepare them for the industry. faqs.question: Q: Is Noorul Islam Centre For Higher Education a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Indeed, one very famous institution is the Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education. It is a private institution based at Kumarakovil in Tamil Nadu, India. In 2008, the Ministry of Human Resource Development declared the Centre that was established in 1989 as a deemed university. The institution offers undergraduate and graduate studies in such fields as engineering, administration, science, and the arts. It holds an A+ grade rating and is NAAC accredited. It has established an impeccable reputation of high standards, highly professional teachers, cutting-edge technology, and superlative research. It is extensively involved with both domestic and international research ventures. Its student body is humongous and multidimensional:
faqs.question: Q: Is Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education a known institute?

faqs.answer: In order to take admission at NICHE, candidates must first register themselves. The registration process is outlined below:Step 1: Registration - Candidates must fill in all necessary details accurately. All future correspondence regarding their application will be sent to the email address and mobile number registered during this step.Step 2: Online Application - Candidates must provide all relevant details accurately before submitting their application. Upon submission, an application number will be generated, which should be kept for future reference.Step 3: Payment - The application fee is Rs. 500/- and is non-refundable. Candidates can make the payment through Netbanking, Credit/Debit card, or Paytm.Step 4: Payment Confirmation - If the payment amount has been debited during the transaction, candidates should wait for an hour to confirm the payment status on the same login page. If the amount has been debited more than once, it will be refunded to their account within 5 to 7 working days.

paragraphs: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission 2025is open for various courses. The university offers various courses such as BTech, BBA, MBA, ME, etc. The selection criteria are entrance-based, NICHE Entrance Exam followed by PI. To get admitted to NICHE, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. The application process atNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Educationis conducted online. However, students can also collect the form from the university by visiting the campus. Read the article to know more aboutNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Educationcourse admission2025.

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission is openfor various programmes. The university provides over 60 courses across multiple specialisations such as Engineering, Business Administration, Management etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education Prospectus 2025

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Education courses:

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admissionsis completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various course programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., www.niuniv.com. The application fee is INR 500. However, candidates can also obtain the form from the university.
STEP 2: Selection

The university selects candidates based on university-level entrance exam scores, i.e., NICHE Entrance Exam followed by PI for various course admission. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Education feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education?
faqs.answer: The NICHE Kanyakumari placements 2025 concluded with 190 students placed. A total of 18 companies participated in the drive. The companies presented more than 305 job offers. The highest package offered was INR 10.12 LPA. The average package stood at INR 3.06 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education placements?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education placements 2025 was INR 10.12 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered during placements 2024 was INR 9 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the placement activities organised at NICHE Kanyakumari?
faqs.answer: Some of the initiatives and activities organised by the Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education placement cell are mentioned below: Training Programmes: To improve students' soft skills, technical skills, aptitude, and communication talents. Industry Interaction: To give students insight into market trends, expectations, and skill requirements, regular meetings with industry professionals are arranged Opportunities for Internships: Encouraging students to participate in internships is a major area of concentration. Placement Drives: Renowned businesses from a range of industries visit the campus to undertake recruitment processes. Career Guidance: To help students make educated career decisions and get ready for the hiring process.

faqs.question: How are the placements at NICHE Kanyakumari?
faqs.answer: As of now, the institute has disclosed the placement rate details for the 2023 drive. As per the report, 95.20% of the 2023 passing out batch was placed. hostel_campus.college_name: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The best university in the whole Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are unbelievable. They provide the needed equipment according to the courses. Classrooms are very decent. They also provide multi-specialty labs for animation students. The hostel is also well-maintained and beautifully maintained by staff.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is amazing. Free Wi-Fi is available. College bus service is available. Administrative staffs and other working staffs are friendly. College libaray is large and has books according to every department. Every class is smart class. There is a separate building for labs.

reviews.review_heading: About Noorul Islam University.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-maintained infrastructure on college campus with Wi-Fi, labs, library, and it is an eco-friendly campus. Hostel and hostel food are not bad, but it varies among students because students from North India don't like those foods.

reviews.review_heading: This college is highly a good option for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our course are highlightable. This course has been moving a great demand for now and in future. Our department and our classrooms are well-equipped and labs and labs are well-settled and clean. Hostel is well-spacious and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Noorul Islam:The Walk Of Life
reviews.review_text: The overall  infrastructural area was impressive as it has a location on uphill and has wonderful view.The classrooms and labs are impressive as it was highly developed for out studies.The library is spacious and huge and had a vast collection of books which is great.The Hostel facilities are great student staff interactions are too good and has a great bond.The quality of the food is superb and tasty.The institution showed great support for sports and games and even helped the students to parti...

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure, Eco-Friendly Campus
reviews.review_text: The hostel mess food is not suitable for everyone. There is a gym in the hostel for both boys and girls. Free Wi-Fi is available for students. The health center operates 24/7. Various sports activities are offered, including inter-college competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Right one for career, good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility is available on our campus. Classrooms are quite okay. The library is notable as it has a vast collection of books on various categories. They conduct various clubs like arts, literature, sports, eco-green club, social service club, yoga, and more. Hostel mess food might not be okay for everyone, but many canteens are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: So dissatisfied with placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good, and the food is also good. I'm not a hosteler. But there is no Wi-Fi connection. And not a good tower for any SIM; some time it's been total tower down also happen. There are many sports that are unimportant to sports and are not available.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lot of discrimination.
reviews.review_text: Teachers are very good and friendly to all. They are very skilled, and teaching subjects professionally will be very useful to our career. The hostel's quality and facilities are very good. The food and mess canteen are all very clean and good.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lot of discrimination.
reviews.review_text: The hostel stay is so comfortable that there are no words to describe it. Moreover, the food is also very clean and hygienic. There's currently no power cutting, and 24-hour Wi-Fi is provided with high-speed internet. Additionally, there is extensive security for girls, making them feel safer.

reviews.review_heading: I am very grateful to be in.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course, including Wi-Fi lab classrooms, are very comfy and pleasant, and it includes a nice library area, which gives the students a bright future. The university enables every little facility to improve our skills.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, with well-equipped labs and well-educated teachers in high-teaching classrooms with Wi-Fi access throughout the campus. I am a day student, although I know the facilities of the hostel. The hostel was super cool, with many amenities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a good campus. But the canteen is the only drawback.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has good infrastructure. We have lots of trees on the campus, and the classrooms are okay. The canteen on the campus is not good; that's the only drawback on the campus. On campus, I can breathe fresh air, and the environment itself gives me peace of mind.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has average infrastructure. We have state-of-the-art infrastructure. But there is no good canteen on the campus. Good labs are all in good working condition, but not all are clean. Good green land under the mountains. Most of the fans and lights are not working.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is up to standard, and all the needed facilities are provided for the students. The labs have all the necessary facilities and also have a new iOS lab, which was inaugurated 3 months back. Medical facilities are provided to all the students for free.

likes.text: Companies like Cognizant, Hexaware, and Petrostax LLP visited our campus, and core companies like TVS, JBM, Ashok Leyland, and Motherson Group also visited our campus.

review_content.Placements: BAMS is a good course for students who lost track while preparing for NEET to get MBBS as it has a lot of potentials and growing nowadays. review_content.Placements: Forget about placement; our college doesn't have any placement. If a student wants to get their B. Pharmacy degree, then he or she can attend our college. review_content.Infrastructure: Here, the library contains old edition books. You don't get any facilities as such; even Wi-Fi is not working in our college. College infrastructure is average. reviews_list.review_title: College is good but there is no scope for placement or the future.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Medical facilities are provided by the college.

content.Infrastructure: Here, the library contains old edition books. You don't get any facilities as such; even Wi-Fi is not working in our college. College infrastructure is average. Even then, it's not wall-washed in many years. Infrastructure-wise, this college is the worst. I don't recommend it to anyone.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is good but there is no scope for placement or the future.

content.Placements: There were more than 100 students in each batch, and a maximum of 5 students got placement through the college, with an average package of INR 2 LPA and the highest package of INR 3 LPA. No student got an internship program through college. B Pharmacy offers the main roll in the college; most of the students took admission in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. But there is no Wi-Fi setup for the students, and laboratories also have very little equipment and chemicals for the students to use. There is no hostel mess or canteen in the college. Medical facilities are provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The rewa pharmacy college is absolutely good for placements and good faculty member.

content.Placements: There are so many companies who visit here. Like intas, abbot, cipla and so on. They give very good package and so many students placed in these companies. The average package given by the company is 2 lacs and the highest package is 4. 6 lacs from very good company.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in the rewa college all the students came from other cities are living outside the campus on rentals and surviving on their own. There was no hostel in Rewa Pharmacy College.
content.Faculty: The faculty member of pharmacy college are very good they are well educated and well trained persons and all the teacher for Ph.D. They do hard labour and they help students and maintain discipline. College is good and the environment of the college is very good.

MPT course students are taught Basic Medical Science, Exercise Physiology, Exercise Therapy, Biomechanics and Kinesiology, Emergency Care, and others. BPT and MPT students are placed in top companies and hospitals. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by KMCH College of Physiotherapy and their respective eligibility. At the PG level, the college offers a two-year MPT course to students. The total seat intake for the MPT is 6 seats/ branch. admission_process.title: KMCH College of Physiotherapy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KMCH College of Physiotherapy admission process 2025ismerit-based. KMCH College of Physiotherapy, affiliated withthe Tamil Nadu Dr.M.G.R. Medical University, offersBPTcourse at the UG level, andMPTcourse at PG level. These courses are available in four streams which are Physiotherapy, Orthopedics, Neurology, Cardio Respiratory.

To be admitted to the KMCH courses, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Eligible candidates need to apply for the admission on the official website of theKMCH College of Physiotherapy.

KMCH College of Physiotherapy is open for admission 2025. To apply for admission, candidates should have completed17 yearsof age as onDec31st, of the admission year. Both male and female candidates can apply for the admission. Interested candidates must ensure that they are meeting the admission requirements for their desired course.
Below mentioned are the KMCH College of Physiotherapy eligibility and selection criteria details for the BPT & MPT courses:
Eligibility
Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology / Botany & Zoology from any recognised board
Merit-based
Minimum 55% aggregate inBPT
Merit-based
Note: Vocational stream is not eligible for admission.
Know more aboutKMCH College of Physiotherapy courses

KMCH College of Physiotherapy offers admission to BPT and MPT courses. Candidates who are meeting the above mentioned criteria, can fill the online form. Before applying, candidates should keep the documents ready for the application process.
Below mentioned is the KMCH College of Physiotherapy admission process:
Step 1:Application:Candidates need to apply on the official website of KMCH College of Physiotherapykmchphysiotherapy.ac.in
Step 2: Selection:Selection to BPT and MPT courses, are done on the basis of merit-list.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation:Candidates are required to pay the admission fee to secure the seat for their desired course.
