reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: ICFAI Jaipur experience.

review_content.Placements: In BCA, the average salary package offered is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 14 LPA-15 LPA. Top recruiting companies such as Infosys, Wipro, TCS, GeeksforGeeks, Collebra, Gravita, Xebia, and many other good brands visit here to hire students. They offer all roles in any field. In our course, the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 12 LPA-14 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good. Hostel, mess, and Wi-Fi are available 24/7 on college campus for students. Hostel are good and we can play any sport we want. We can truly enjoy campus life here.

reviews_list.review_title: Strong Placement Record with Excellent Industry Connections.

review_content.Placements: 90% of the students are placed, but the university tries its best for all the students. The lowest package is 2-3 LPA, the average is 5-7 LPA, and the highest is 21.75 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Byju's, and others recruit here. There is a 100% internship rate. Fields of study include Machine Learning, Data Science, DBMS, Testing, Deep Learning, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

review_summary.college_name: ICFAI University Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) (Hons.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My college life at ICFAI, Jaipur.

content.Placements: There was placement drive which was conducted for our batch. From our batch, the highest package was 6 LPA. Out of 27 students from our batch 5-6 students who took part in placement drive got placed, others haven't participated. There were ICICI Bank, Pin Click, Byju's, and many other companies for the placement drive for our course. For the 1 batch before us for the same course, the highest package was 11 LPA offered by Byju's.
content.Infrastructure: As I was from ICFAI tech department so there were proper computer labs and other labs like DLD, physics, and chemistry. There was a central library for all departments. There was Wi-Fi in all places on campus. I was a hostel student so I could say that hostels were very good. There were all types of basic needed things available like washing machines, oven, induction, TV room, and sports hall inside hostel. Food was also good if there was any issue related to food sometimes it was solved as soon as possible.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College js pretty good. But if you have any other option, you may go.

content.Placements: Till now, batch size was good, but from now they increased batch size, and they are managing well. But college offering well enough to students. We are facing summer internship programme. We are no getting the, and the company's are not responding as we expected.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. Campus is big, and you can enjoy here college life. Environment is also soo good. I will prefer it by campus. You can enjoy, and you can do many activities here. There is each playground; you can survive there with enjoyment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: ICFAI Jaipur experience.

content.Placements: In BCA, the average salary package offered is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 14 LPA-15 LPA. Top recruiting companies such as Infosys, Wipro, TCS, GeeksforGeeks, Collebra, Gravita, Xebia, and many other good brands visit here to hire students. They offer all roles in any field. In our course, the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 12 LPA-14 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good. Hostel, mess, and Wi-Fi are available 24/7 on college campus for students. Hostel are good and we can play any sport we want. We can truly enjoy campus life here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Strong Placement Record with Excellent Industry Connections.

content.Placements: 90% of the students are placed, but the university tries its best for all the students. The lowest package is 2-3 LPA, the average is 5-7 LPA, and the highest is 21.75 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Byju's, and others recruit here. There is a 100% internship rate. Fields of study include Machine Learning, Data Science, DBMS, Testing, Deep Learning, and more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Amazing ICFAI University.

content.Placements: In ICFAI, there are departments for Law, Business, and Tech. In the Tech department, courses include BTech, BSc, and BCA in domains like AI, Cyber Security, Data Science, and Forensic Science. The placement rate is 90% in Tech, with the highest package till now being 21 LPA and the average around 6 or 7 LPA. Companies that have conducted recruitment include Xebia, Metacube, and Jaro. This university also provides various workshops and seminars to improve soft skills and offers many opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

admission_overview.title: ICFAI University Jaipur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ICFAI University Jaipur admissions are based on merit or entrance exam scores of the candidates. The university conducts ICFAI Law School Admission Test for BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons) courses. The university offers UG, PG and PhD level programmes. ICFAI University Jaipur offers courses in Science, Commerce, Arts, Computer Application, Management and other streams. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: ICFAI University Jaipur Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The university considers the qualifying exam scores of the candidates for admission to most of the courses. For courses such as BA LLB (Hons), BBA LLB (Hons), MTech, etc., admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. Below are the popular ICFAI University Jaipur courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Course

Final year students applying for this course need to complete their examinations including practical/ viva, assigments before the deadline to apply for BPharm. Such applicants also need to produce a certificate at the time of admission.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BPharm at ICFAI University Jaipur?

faqs.answer: No, candidates do not require passing an entrance exam for admission in MCA programme at ICFAI University Jaipur. The university shortlists candidates for MCA based on their merit. Candidates need to complete BCA/ BSc (IT)/ BSc (Computer Science) or equivalent degree or pass in BSc/ BCom/ BA with Mathematics as one of the subjects at Class 12 or rgaduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for MCA.
faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for MCA at ICFAI University Jaipur?

faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (best of 5 subjects including English) are eligible to apply for BA LLB (Hons) at ICFAI University Jaipur. Besides, aspirants should also have a valid score in CLAT or LSAT for admission. Candidates without any entrance exam scores can appear for ICFAI Law School Admission Test (ILSAT) for admission.

paragraphs: ICFAI Universityadmission processcan be completed online mode. The process includes various steps like registration, selection and admission confirmation. Check below the steps to take admission at the university:
ICFAI University Jaipur Application Process 2026

Candidates can apply online for their preferred programme. Aspirants applying via CUET must first fill the application form of the entrance exam. Candidates are charged an application fee of INR 500 to register for a course.

ICFAI University Jaipur selects candidates for UG courses based on merit or CUET-UG score. The university also accepts scores in LSAT, CLAT,  ICFAI Law School Admission Test for admission to BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons) courses. Aspirants are shortlisted for PG programmes based on entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round.
Admission Confirmation
The university notifies the candidates about their selection via email or message.

courses_data.name: ICFAI University Jaipur BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a four-year full-time BTech programme divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science, CSE-AI & ML, CSE (DS & AI),Mechanicaland ECE (VLSI Design). Admission to BTech programme is based on merit in the qualifying exam or CUET-UG scores. Selected candidates are further required to pass the personal interview round.

faqs.question: Is CUET accepted for BTech at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Yes, ICFAI University Jaipur does consider CUET score for admission to BTech programme. However, it is not mandatory to have a CUET score for admission. Candidates are also selected for BTech programme based on their Class 12 score. Once selected, aspirants also need to pass a personal interview round for admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate with pass in Mathematics, Physics, English and any one of the following subjects: Chemistry or Biology or Biotechnology or Computer Science to apply for ICFAI University Jaipur BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a four-year full-time BTech programme spread across eight semesters. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for BTech programme. The course is offered in various branches such as:Computer ScienceCSE-AI & MLCSE (DS & AI)MechanicalECE (VLSI Design)

faqs.answer: The specific cutoff details for The ICFAI University Jaipur's 2024 admissions are not available. Cutoff information can differ based on the year and the respective entrance exam.

courses_data.name: ICFAI University Jaipur MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a two-year full-time MBA programme. The course includes 21 are compulsory courses and 8 elective courses. The course also includes a Summer Internship programme. The course is divided into four semesters. Students can choose elective from available options- Marketing, HRM, IT & Systems and Finance.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must pass a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for ICFAI University Jaipur MBA programme. Final year degree students awaiting results are also eligible to apply for the MBA course. Besides, aspirants can get admission in MBA based on entrance exam scores such as CAT, NMAT, etc. followed by a personal interview round.

faqs.question: What are the MBA electives available at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a two-year full-time MBA programme at the PG level. During the course, students need to choose electives. Below are the electives available for the MBA course:MarketingHRMIT & SystemsFinance

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for MBA admission at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur MBA course admission is entrance-based. The eligible candidates can apply with a valid score of CAT/ NMAT/ XAT/ GMAT/ Other Management Test scores. Shortlisted candidates are further called for the interview round or other selection rounds. As per the official website, the selection procedure will be held in 8 IBS campuses and the IBS Head Office. Apart from this, the eligibility requirements must be met.

faqs.question: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?
faqs.answer: CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination isCBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.

ICFAI University Jaipur MBA average package offered in 2024 was INR 7.3 LPA . The MBA placement rate recorded in 2024 was 97%.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BA at ICFAI University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur BA fees is sum of various components. These components are charged either one-time or semester-wise or annually. The semester fee for the BA programmes is INR 12,500 per semester for domicile students. The semester fees is INR 15,000 for non-domicile students.

faqs.question: How much does BBA at ICFAI University Jaipur cost?
faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur BBA tuition fee is INR 2.8 lakh . In addition, a one-time fee of INR 20,000 is also included in the fee structure. The fees for the integrated BBA course may vary. This fee amount is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

highlights.description:
The ICFAI University, Jaipur has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes in the city of Jaipur for Management and BBA education by numerous national and international ranking agencies such as Outlook-ICARE, GHRDC, IIRF, etc.
The institute was ranked #9 in the BBA category by Outlook-ICARE 2025, while its 2024 rankings saw it being ranked #1 by GHRDC in the Outstanding B-Schools category. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. Interested students can check some of the ICFAI Jaipur rankings here:

hostel_campus.college_name: ICFAI University Jaipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: ICFAI University, Jaipur provides hostel facility for girls and boys on first cum first serve basis. In addition the University administration helps students to seek a suitable accommodation near by the campus.
facilities: Hostel: The university has hostels for both boys and girls, with AC and Non-AC rooms, with single and double occupancy. There is also a state-of-the-art dining facility available.
Library: The library has 18394 books, 7007 titles, 13 journals and 1 database. There is also a reading room with a seating capacity of over 50 students.
Laboratories: The campus consists of a total of 28 Laboratories, wherein one is a language lab, and the others are laboratories for the engineering students.

Sports and Recreation: The university provides recreational facilities for indoor and outdoor games like Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Badminton, Chess, Carom, etc. The students also get access to a spacious and well-equipped gymnasium, which has A/C and audio facilities. The Gym has separate timings for men and women.

Moot Court and Legal Aid Clinic: These two facilities are for law students. The Moot Court helps students gain practical experience and improve analytical reasoning,  legal aptitude and presentation and communication skills. The Legal Aid Clinic is the way ICFAI Law School contributes to society by spreading legal awareness, legal literacy and by providing legal services. It aims to coordinate with the District and State Legal Services Authorities in solving the disputes of the local people. These initiative aims at making the students independent before they plunge into the competitive professional environment.

library.description: ICFAI University Jaipur  has a  central library and departmental libraries.The library is fully automated and has a huge collection of books.It is functioning on the basis of an 'open access' system.It has a collection of 14000 books and 91 journals.It has well-equipped reading room with seating capacity of over 100 students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: My college life at ICFAI, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: As I was from ICFAI tech department so there were proper computer labs and other labs like DLD, physics, and chemistry. There was a central library for all departments. There was Wi-Fi in all places on campus. I was a hostel student so I could say that hostels were very good. There were all types of basic needed things available like washing machines, oven, induction, TV room, and sports hall inside hostel. Food was also good if there was any issue related to food sometimes it was solved as soon...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by ICFAI Business School, JaipurReviewed on 31 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College js pretty good. But if you have any other option, you may go.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. Campus is big, and you can enjoy here college life. Environment is also soo good. I will prefer it by campus. You can enjoy, and you can do many activities here. There is each playground; you can survive there with enjoyment.

reviews.review_heading: ICFAI Jaipur experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. Hostel, mess, and Wi-Fi are available 24/7 on college campus for students. Hostel are good and we can play any sport we want. We can truly enjoy campus life here.

reviews.review_heading: Strong Placement Record with Excellent Industry Connections.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing ICFAI University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: A Very Amazing University
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by ICFAI Business School, JaipurReviewed on 7 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: One of best B schools for me.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, and many improvements are needed. For example, there is no auditorium, and the number of classrooms is very low. However, the hostel is good and has all the necessary facilities. The food in the mess is good, and the campus has a lot of greenery. The sports facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Not a very good college, just average.
reviews.review_text: Most of the amenities were provided in classrooms, like AC furniture, smart devices, Wi-Fi, a computer lab, and a library named NJ Yassy Library. The quality of the QT hostel is not really good. Many kinds of play grounds were on campus, like football, cricket, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. Our college has all kinds of labs like computer labs, AV labs, communication labs, etc. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess is good. Our college has greenery. Our college is under CCTV surveillance. They provide medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by ICFAI Business School, JaipurReviewed on 12 Mar 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Worth paying the fees if you're an enthusiastic learner .
reviews.review_text: The campus has a large area including football and cricket grounds, basketball court, gym, indoor halls with air conditioned classrooms and library. Wi-Fi is 24/7 available in campus and hostels. Mess food is of good quality and hygienic. Hostel amenities are excellent .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is great in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: This university itself has all the facilities, courts have been provided for playing, good suitable environment for studying. Though the edition of the books in library is very old. It should be renewed atleast every 3-4 year. Wi-Fi is provided to each student on their official account created by the institution themselves. It provides great infrastructure, and commendable vice chancellor.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and clean. All laboratories are fully loaded with computers. There is a good quality of food in the mess and canteen. There are good facilities of medical. There is a large sports grounds for football, volleyball, cricket, and basketball in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of The ICFAI University, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the campus is clean. It has AC and computers in labs. The food is very affordable here. We have a large football ground, a basketball court, and a volleyball court. It is nice to visit the campus if you need to.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good in infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with a huge playground and air-conditioned rooms. It has well-settled laboratories and the library is also available. The canteen is also good and reasonable prices are available. The hotel facilities are good and strict. The sports teacher is also strict.

reviews.review_heading: It has good, helpful, and friendly faculty members. Sports opportunities are also good enough.
reviews.review_text: They provide 1000 Mbps Wi-Fi all over the campus. There are 3 labs, and classrooms are big enough and with proper sanitation. We have an average size library with enough books for our study as well as knowledge purpose. Canteen food is good in health and taste. Medical facilities are not good enough but there are many sports like volleyball, football, basketball, handball, cricket, kabaddi, chess, carrom, and table tennis.

college_info.college_name: ICFAI University Jaipur

data.description: ICFAI University Jaipur faculty members are highly educated and have decades worth of experience in both academia and industry. The faculty is led by President (VC) Prof (Dr) H. P. Singh, VSM , who is an IIT Kharagpur alumnus and retired Naval Commodore with 30+ years of strategic leadership.   As part of the ICFAI Group, the Jaipur campus utilizes 100% case-based methodology for its MBA program, leveraging a repository second only to Harvard.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about The ICFAI University, Jaipur

likes.text: Companies like ICICI, IDBI, HDFC, Aditya Birla, Decathlon, Ceasefire, Karvy and many others visit the campus for placements.
The college provides the good placement.The placement cell keenly looks after the requirements of the student so as they get selected in good companies like Infosys, TCS, etc.

paragraphs: Yes, ICFAI University Jaipur provide scholarships to meritorious students. It is provided based on academic merit and semester-wise performance. The scholarship amount varies based on the applicants CGPA. Below table can be referred for merit scholarship based on semester-wise performance for BSc students:

ICFAI Jaipur BA fees is sum of various components. These components are charged either one-time or semester-wise or annually. The semester fee for the BA programmes is INR 12,500 per semester for domicile students. The semester fees is INR 15,000 for non-domicile students.

ICFAI Jaipur BBA tuition fee is INR 2.8 lakh. In addition, a one-time fee of INR 20,000 is also included in the fee structure. The fees for the integrated BBA course may vary. This fee amount is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
